title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXXVI. Songs.
content:
You shall have an apple,
            You shall have a plum,
        You shall have a rattle-basket,
            When your dad comes home.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CXXXVI. Songs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
